title: stelis maniola
intro: Stelis maniola, a species of orchid, is a type of flowering plant known for its unique and delicate appearance. The plant has been used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Stelis maniola include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce inflammation, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of Stelis maniola can be found in the form of teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
